title: lathyrus japonicus var. albescens
intro: Lathyrus japonicus var. albescens, also known as white flowering pea, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and possessing antimicrobial properties. Lathyrus japonicus var. albescens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, although more research is needed to fully confirm its efficacy and safety.
